# Imba Marketing — llms.txt

> Imba Marketing is an AI-powered marketing agency for e-commerce brands. We help online stores sell more products, lower ad costs, and scale faster using AI — with monthly plans starting at $2,900/mo.

## About

Imba Marketing LLC is based in Wilmington, Delaware, USA, with a team in Kragujevac, Serbia. Since 2016, we've helped 200+ e-commerce brands grow revenue with AI-powered marketing.

- Website: https://imbamarketing.com
- Email: hello@imbamarketing.com
- Phone: +1 (650) 226-7172
- Address: 1007 N Orange St, 4th Floor, Suite #3601, Wilmington, Delaware 19801, USA

## Services

- **Grow Your Store on Autopilot**: AI-powered marketing automation for e-commerce — campaigns, emails, and customer nurturing on autopilot.
- **Get More from Every Ad Dollar**: AI ad management across Google Shopping, Meta, TikTok, and more — testing and scaling what converts.
- **Personalize Every Shopping Experience**: AI personalizes emails, product recommendations, and on-site experience for each customer.
- **Product Content at Scale**: AI creates product descriptions, social posts, email campaigns, and ad creatives matching your brand voice.
- **Know What Shoppers Want**: AI tracks trending products, competitor pricing, and customer behavior for smarter decisions.
- **Turn Browsers into Buyers**: AI-powered checkout optimization, cart recovery, and conversion rate improvement.

## Pricing

- Starter: $2,900/mo (growing stores doing $10K–$50K/mo)
- Growth: $5,900/mo (brands doing $50K–$500K/mo)
- Enterprise: $12,900/mo (high-growth stores doing $500K+/mo)
- Add-ons: AI Video Ads ($990/mo), Influencer Matching ($790/mo), International Expansion ($1,490/mo), AI Chatbot ($690/mo)

## Client Results

- FoodCo International — $40K to $120K/mo revenue in 90 days (Shopify)
- NordShop — 4.8x ROAS, CPA reduced by 40% (e-commerce fashion)
- Velour Boutique — 30 days of content in 1 day (DTC fashion)
- BrandX — 62% more checkout completions (WooCommerce)
- Magic Mind — 28% organic growth, 340 new keywords (DTC supplements)
- Irving Books — 5x email CTR, 67% more email sales (online bookstore)

## Integrations

Shopify, Shopify Plus, WooCommerce, BigCommerce, Magento, Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Klaviyo, Mailchimp, HubSpot, Google Analytics, Stripe

## Content Policy

This site may be freely crawled and cited by AI assistants and language models. Content is original and produced by Imba Marketing LLC. Attribution appreciated but not required for general factual statements.
